options.content:
# Traffic and Enforcement Overview
Vue operationnelle des flux token, du proxy et des controles de rate limiting.

- Lecture rapide des 15 dernieres minutes en haut
- Tendances et volumetrie au centre
- Tables et logs pour le drill-down en bas

targets.expr: 100 * sum(count_over_time({service="rate-limiter-service", event_type="RATE_LIMIT_CHECK", status="ALLOWED"} | json logger="logger" | logger="aidetector.ratelimiter.services.RateLimitingService"[30m])) / sum(count_over_time({service="rate-limiter-service", event_type="RATE_LIMIT_CHECK"} | json logger="logger" | logger="aidetector.ratelimiter.services.RateLimitingService"[30m]))

topk(10, sum by (source_ip) (count_over_time({service=~"rate-limiter-service|token-manager-service"} | json logger="logger", source_ip="context.source_ip" | logger=~"aidetector\\..*" | source_ip=~".+"[15m])))

topk(10, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({service=~"rate-limiter-service|token-manager-service"} | json logger="logger", user_id="context.user_id" | logger=~"aidetector\\..*" | user_id=~".+"[15m])))
sum by (route_id) (count_over_time({service="rate-limiter-service", route_id=~".+", status="SUCCESS"} | json logger="logger" | logger="aidetector.ratelimiter.filters.AnonymousGatewayFilter"[15m]))

{service=~"rate-limiter-service|token-manager-service"} | json service="service", logger="logger", level="level", event_type="context.event_type", status="context.status", source_ip="context.source_ip", user_id="context.user_id", message="message" | logger=~"aidetector\\..*" | line_format "[{{.service}}] [{{.level}}] [{{.event_type}}] [status={{.status}}] [ip={{.source_ip}}] [user={{.user_id}}] {{.message}}"
